title: Rename split score taxonomy to Information Accuracy

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Renaming the seven live split scores from the Agent Misrepresentation prefix to Information Accuracy and updating the composite dependency names to match. Legacy Agent Misrepresentation scores remain untouched unless separately requested.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Completed the Information Accuracy rename in Plexus. The seven split scores and composite now use the Information Accuracy prefix, new keys, and matching placeholder external IDs. The composite dependency list was rewritten to the renamed score names. Verified the scorecard listing shows the renamed scores, and verified live prediction lookup/execution with Information Accuracy: High-Pressure Tactics on item 308889128.
